race.comment: KIDS INTHE KITCHEN (1) performed well last time at this track, finishing fourth and only 1.5 lengths from the winner at the end of 1625m. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside marble and is a likely improver with strong winning prospects. CONEY ISLAND BABY (3) has returned in good order this preparation. Opened with a third at Warwick two starts back then got the job done by 5.5 lengths as public elect last time out over 1500m at Kilcoy. Best figures measure up and is sure to run well. CHEERFUL CAT (7) hasn't been far away recently including last time out when second over 1540m at Gold Coast Poly. Should park just off the speed and can feature in the finish. MOONFLEET (4) next.
